experiments.hypothesis: Question-format headlines will outperform statement headlines in paid search for developer segment
experiments.summary: Question headlines ('Still deploying manually?') decisively outperformed statement headlines ('Deploy Apps Faster'). Effect was even stronger for non-technical segment (+41% with 'no code' framing). Rolled to production.

experiments.hypothesis: Activation emails with specific project templates will outperform generic 'explore' CTAs
experiments.summary: Specific templates ('Build a habit tracker') crushed generic CTAs. Also discovered celebration emails ('Your app is live!') drive +31% D7 retention. Both patterns rolled to production lifecycle sequence.

experiments.hypothesis: Before/after transformation social creatives will outperform feature announcements for non-technical builders
experiments.summary: Transformation narrative ('I described an app → here it is running') massively outperformed feature announcement format. Also validated social proof numbers in search extensions (+18% CVR). Production rollout for both patterns.

experiments.hypothesis: India geo-specific messaging with 'free' prominence will outperform global messaging
experiments.summary: Massive validation of geo-differentiated approach. 'Free' in first 3 words was the strongest single lever in India. Also discovered India students want 'learn to build' framing (+67% vs 'build without coding'). Spawned META-001 (geo-specific > global).

experiments.hypothesis: 'Describe what you want' emotional hook will outperform feature-list hooks for non-technical segment across channels
experiments.summary: The 'describe what you want, watch it get built' framing is now the top-performing hook for non-technical audience. Also validated UGC > brand content (1.7x). Updated positioning doc to elevate 'describe' framing to primary for non-tech.

experiments.hypothesis: Specific time savings in headlines will outperform vague speed claims for developer segment
experiments.summary: Specificity wins confirmed across segments. 'Build & Deploy in Under 5 Min' beat 'Build Apps Faster' for devs. Surprising finding: EU enterprise responded 2.8x to SOC 2 compliance qualifier — security is the gate, not speed. Spawned META-003 (specificity always wins).

experiments.hypothesis: Outcome-framed enterprise messaging ('unblock your team') will outperform technology-framed messaging ('AI-powered development')
experiments.summary: Clear validation that enterprise buyers respond to outcomes, not technology. Also discovered ASO insight: canvas screenshots +19% install rate vs code screenshots for non-technical builders. Updated positioning doc enterprise section.
